use_cases: Selecting from a predefined list of options in forms
Choosing settings like font family or display preferences
Filtering or sorting content in data tables
Capturing user preferences in configuration panels
ai_summary: A Base UI select dropdown component with portal-based positioning for selecting from a list of options. Features smooth scale and opacity animations for popup open/close, scroll-up arrow for long lists, and comprehensive accessibility with focus-visible states. Clean, flat visual design using Tailwind utility classes suitable for any SaaS, fintech, or e-commerce form requiring dropdown selection.
